title: Eriosorus stuebelii
taxonomy: Eriosorus stuebelii is a species of flowering plant in the family Huperziaceae. This family is commonly known as the firmoss family and it is a group of small, non-vascular plants. Eriosorus stuebelii is classified as a member of the genus Eriosorus, which is a group of epiphytic or terrestrial plants found in South America. The plant's classification places it in the division Bryophyta and the class Heterosporae. More specifically, Eriosorus stuebelii is classified as Eriosorus stuebelii (Hieron.) Brause.
